summary: A Fox News 'Special Report' EXCLUSIVE sit-down (anchor Bret Baier interviewing Sec. Kristi Noem at a wood-paneled office desk) about the ongoing terrorist threat and Trump immigration agenda. Lower-thirds read 'THREAT ASSESSMENT / DEPARTMENT EFFORTS TO KEEP AMERICANS SAFE' with LIVE and BREAKING TONIGHT banners. It is a straight cable-news interview with talking heads and no music. Not youth-appeal produced content.
